title: Missing bits in display of a concat

features.name: concatenation with zero literal in display format argument
features.description: Code should include a concatenation expression containing a zero literal (e.g., 4'd0) used as an argument to $display with %x format specifier

features.name: concatenation with multiple part selects in display
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with multiple bit-select parts (t2[15:8] and t2[3:0]) and a zero-inserted literal used in $display format output
